title: campanula rotundifolia var. intercedens
intro: Campanula rotundifolia var. intercedens, also known as the Scottish harebell or bellflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the bellflower family. The medicinal properties of Campanula rotundifolia var. intercedens include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. This plant has been used to treat various health issues, including colds, coughs, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the airways. Campanula rotundifolia var. intercedens is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions or decoctions, and it can also be used in the form of tinctures or dried flowers for added convenience.
